CustomField.description: Auto checked if the "Did Not Submit Supporting Documents - No WL" reason is selected in the "Application Ineligibility Reason(s)" field. Used for Ineligibility CONGA merge.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto checked if the "Did Not Submit Supporting Documents - No WL" reason is selected in the "Application Ineligibility Reason(s)" field. Used for Ineligibility CONGA merge.
CustomField.label: IRC_Did Not Submit Supp Docs - No WL
